title: PVPPACKHID
description: lightweight PvP modpack focused on improving performance and smoother combat.
body:
PVPACKHID

PVPACKHID is a lightweight PvP-focused modpack designed to improve performance and provide a smoother, more responsive combat experience.

Features

- Optimized to improve FPS and reduce lag
- Includes performance and PvP-related mods
- Enhances combat responsiveness and overall gameplay feel
- Suitable for both casual and competitive players

Modpack Focus

This modpack focuses on improving PvP gameplay while maintaining stable performance.
It does not significantly change core Minecraft mechanics.

Requirements

- Minecraft Java Edition 1.21.11
- Fabric Loaderv: 0.18.5

Notes

- Performance may vary depending on your device and settings
- Some features may depend on in-game configuration

Credits

All included mods belong to their respective authors.
